data.title: Samantha LaDuc Says Financial Conditions Are Being Reset and Not Easing: 'Bitcoin Is Trapped'
data.description: Well-known financial analyst Samantha LaDuc has warned about current financial conditions and their impact on Wall Street and Main Street.

data.title: RFK Jr. Takes On Food Giants: Calls Meeting With PepsiCo And General Mills
data.description: Robert F. Kennedy Jr. is set to meet with top food industry executives to discuss health concerns and potential regulatory changes, marking a key moment in his "Make America Healthy Again" movement.

data.title: NBA Legend Shaq's Walmart Shopping Spree Ends In Credit Card Decline—Here's How Much He Tried To Spend
data.description: Basketball superstar Shaquille O'Neal's impact goes beyond basketball, with his larger-than-life personality and smart investments. Yet, one of his most unforgettable moments happened at Walmart.

data.title: Hackers Expose Customer Data—Retail Pharmacy Giant Paying $6.8M in Compensation
data.description: Retail pharmacy giant Rite Aid has agreed to pay $6.8 million to its customers following a significant data breach.

data.title: Tesla's China Boom, Rivian's Sweet Ride, And Trump's Tariffs Threat: This Week In Mobility
data.description: The EV industry saw major developments over the weekend, with Tesla's Model Y surging in China, its Model S/X retreating from Japan, Rivian unveiling its Georgia timeline and an ice cream truck partnership, and Trump's tariffs threatening the profits of Detroit's Big Three automakers.
